title: Review Rails mass-assignment and query surface
description: Scan controllers and models for permissive strong parameters and N+1-prone association access.
body: Use when validating a Rails change. Procedure: read each controller's parameter handling for over-broad permit calls or raw params passed to create/update, check whether protected columns (role, admin, owner) could be set from input, and scan views/services for associations accessed per row without includes. Report which actions risk mass-assignment and which paths risk N+1, with file and line. This skill exposes findings only and must not change permit lists without runtime permission. Validation signals include identifying a forbidden attribute that the controller currently permits. Risk boundary: flag an over-broad permit on a privilege or ownership column as a blocking security finding.
